infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FoodProof DK uses the camera to scan food labels and compare them with Sundhedsstyrelsen's official dietary guidelines.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FoodProof DK reads food label photos from your library so it can analyse them against Sundhedsstyrelsen's official dietary guidelines.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FoodProof DK to access your camera so it can scan food labels.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FoodProof DK to access your photos so it can analyse food labels.
